heading: Repealed. , title IV, § 403(a)(42), , eff.June 27, 1952, ch. 47766 Stat. 280Dec. 24, 1952
label: 901 to 903 Repealed. , title IV, § 403(a)(42), , eff.June 27, 1952, ch. 47766 Stat. 280Dec. 24, 1952
notes: Section 901, , subchap. V, § 501, , related to procedure when diplomatic officials believe that persons in foreign state have lost American nationality. See .act Oct. 14, 1940, ch. 876, title I54 Stat. 1171section 1501 of this title
Section 902, , subchap. V, § 502, , related to certificates of nationality for non-naturalized United States nationals. See .act Oct. 14, 1940, ch. 876, title I54 Stat. 1171section 1502 of this title

Section 903, , subchap. V, § 503, , related to judicial proceedings for declaration of United States nationality in event of denial of rights and privileges as national. See .act Oct. 14, 1940, ch. 876, title I54 Stat. 1171section 1503 of this title
